title: Central and South Edition Safari
description: A classic safari covering The Ark, Lake Nakuru and Maasai Mara with full board accommodation and extensive game drives.
highlights: Stay at The Ark in Aberdares

itinerary.title: Nairobi to The Ark
itinerary.description: Transfer to The Ark for overnight stay and wildlife viewing.

itinerary.title: The Ark to Lake Nakuru
itinerary.description: Drive to Lake Nakuru and enjoy a game drive.

itinerary.title: Lake Nakuru to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Transfer to Maasai Mara and check in at Olkinyei Camp.

itinerary.title: Full Day Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Enjoy unlimited game drives in Maasai Mara.

travelInfo.clothes: Light clothing, warm layers for mornings, sunscreen.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals at all lodges.

note: Rates are per person depending on season.
